name: Sakeer

skills.name: Firefly Protection
skills.description: Basic Attacks and skills summon fireflies that deal extra damage to enemies and grant vision of them. Periodically heals teammates. Can charge up his Basic Attack to heal himself.

skills.name: Mulberry Power
skills.description: Launches and damages enemies in front while summoning fireflies to heal teammates or damage enemies.

skills.name: Ride the Wind
skills.description: Flies to a brush while summoning fireflies that heal teammates or damage enemies.

skills.name: Firefly Fields
skills.description: Summons a brush and can fly into it by using this skill again. The brush summons fireflies over time that heal teammates or damage enemies.

tips: Sakeer is a Easy Support (Roaming) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 53.3% win rate and 0.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Boots of the Arcane → Overlord's Platemail → Breakthrough Robe → Augur's Word → Frozen Breath.
Run Fate for stats that match Sakeer's Support kit. Take Smite & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Mulberry Power → Ride the Wind → Firefly Fields → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.
Teamfight: Peel carry first, then look for pick on out-of-position enemies. Ward Tyrant 30s before spawn.
Sakeer excels into Ying, Luna. Avoid blind picking into Haya without team peel.

Sakeer sits at Tier B globally (53.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: Is Sakeer good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Sakeer is Tier B Support with 53.3% win rate, 0.5% pick rate, and 0.0% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Niche — draft carefully.

faqs.question: What is the best Sakeer build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Boots of the Arcane, Overlord's Platemail, Breakthrough Robe, Augur's Word, Frozen Breath, longevity. Run Fate arcana with Smite & Flash. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Sakeer?
faqs.answer: Pick Haya into Sakeer. Deny Roaming resources early and force fights before Sakeer completes core items. Sakeer struggles when the enemy can out-range or out-sustain them.

faqs.question: Who does Sakeer counter?
faqs.answer: Sakeer is strong into Ying, Luna according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Sakeer when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Roaming lane.

faqs.question: Is Sakeer good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Sakeer sits at Tier B globally (53.3% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick. Camp data shows above-average win rate — prioritize when not hard-countered in draft.

faqs.question: What lane should Sakeer play?
faqs.answer: Sakeer is tagged Roaming in Camp export (Support, Mage). Help marksman crash wave, then rotate mid for picks. Return before Tyrant if your carry has no escape.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Sakeer?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Fate arcana. Battle spell: Smite & Flash. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Sakeer or Dolia — which is better?
faqs.answer: Sakeer vs Dolia (Support, Tier S): Dolia is 1.8% pick / 46.1% WR. Sakeer has +7.2% WR vs Dolia in Camp data. Choose Sakeer when you need Roaming identity; choose Dolia for Roaming comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Sakeer?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.0%). Focus bans on higher-tier Support picks unless targeting a one-trick.
